componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
We're thrilled to share the latest updates with our colleagues at Moving Intelligence!

Our team is continuing to grow with the addition of EuropeTrack & SlimmGPS, and we're excited to collaborate on new projects and initiatives.

In addition, we have seen great success with recent online campaigns and continue to make improvements to our products and services. Finally, we had the opportunity to both visit and organize events that brought together industry experts and new potential customers.

Keep reading for more information on these and other exciting subjects!

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Product development

We're working with our partner to prepare the new Mi50s, which have been delayed due to adjustments including a Cat M1 modem (with 4G/2G fallback), temperature controller, and keypad connection. Our goal is to make the new units available by May 4th, despite a current shortage.

We're also preparing for new homologations of both the Mi50 and Mi01 after successful tests with third parties. Additionally, we're collaborating with Gemini, an Italian car alarm manufacturer, to develop a Mi50 immobilizer and alarm for the Dutch car market, as well as a Mi50 for the English leisure market to replace the CalAmp units. The next newsletter will have more details on these developments and other new software updates.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
SalesForce & Exact

Step by step, we manage to implement Salesforce as CRM and Exact as accounting package across the entire group. With this we enable a way of working that optimally enables us to be successful together! Occasionally the road is a bit bumpy, but it's nice to see that together we don't let setbacks get us down!

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Total Active Subscriptions

MiDE -   18.664
MiUK -   21.885
MiNL - 101.546

Total - 142.095
Note: The numbers contain all platforms.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Porsche GT3 Club Event

The GT3 club NL visited our company on April 22nd, with over 30 Porsche 911s parked in front of our building. Participants enjoyed networking while sipping delicious espresso or cappuccino, listening to music in the background.

Niels presented our company, products, and services, followed by a lunch prepared by Corrie. Martin gave an extensive demo of our platform in the experience room, explaining how we locate stolen objects. Participants left for the tour towards the Porsche dealer in Eindhoven, with each given a Chocolade bar with the size of a Mi01 and an information flyer.

The event resulted in 60 new ambassadors for our company, with the first sales inquiry received for securing three cars on the following Monday. This opportunity was won, making the event a great success for us.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: <hr style="height: 2px; background-color: #e20030; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 23px; width:100%;border: none;">

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
MiNL on Trustpilot

Moving Intelligence Netherlands started to collect customers and dealer reviews via Trustpilot by claiming the MiNL profile and sending invitations to 100 relations. The first couple of days we already reviews with an average of 4.5/5 stars.

We keep on promoting our Trustpilot by inviting more customers and implementing it to our communication channels.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Our new sales team members have opened their first accounts!

  • JW Civils were considering Trackershop but Callum was able to talk them around.
  • Michelle also opened a new account with Hillside, who have already purchased
    40 units from us!
Moving Intelligence now supply both the first and second largest dealerships in South Wales. Da iawn tîm!

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
How to protect a motorhome from professional thieves?

Moving Intelligence GmbH partnered with the "Waldhelden" team to create a video showcasing their Mi50 GPS tracker and MiBlock immobilizer for motorhomes.

The video demonstrates the installation and effectiveness of the security solution, which helps RV owners prevent theft and unauthorized engine starts.

It has received over 50,000 views on YouTube.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: <hr style="height: 2px; background-color: #e20030; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 23px; width:100%;border: none;">

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Entrepreneurs' Afternoons

Moving Intelligence GmbH presented digital fleet management solutions at the Entrepreneurs' Evening in Lübbenau, where major trends and future challenges in the transport industry were discussed.

With a focus on electromobility, sustainability, and potential optimization, the presentation provided valuable insights for the 50 entrepreneurs in attendance.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
We would like to welcome all of our new colleagues to the Mi Team and introduce them to you!

This MeetMi we'll start off with our new team members of EuropeTrack.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Thijs van der Lugt (48)
Sales Manager Fleet

Thijs is one of the owners of EuropeTrack, together with Ewout, the owner of SlimmGPS. Thijs lives with his partner Sharina and their two daughters in Leidschendam. Thijs has a lot of sales experience in the field of Telematics, and also has a clear opinion on marketing and finance. In addition to his tasks for EuropeTrack, he also runs SlimmGPS from sales to invoicing. If you want to reach Thijs for anything or just have a chat, you can email him at thijs@europetrack.eu.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Ewout van der Kraan (46)
Sales Professional Fleet

Ewout is also one of the four owners of EuropeTrack. He lives with his wife and two children in Berkel en Rodenrijs and when he's had enough, he likes to escape to the forests to go on beautiful hikes abroad or dive to great depths. Ewout is mainly involved in the procurement of products and the financial aspects of EuropeTrack. If you want to know more about the ins and outs of EuropeTrack, you can always send him an email at ewout@europetrack.eu.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Albert Drenth (38)
Full Stack Software Developer

Co-founder of EuropeTrack. Full stack software developer with a focus on integrating hardware and linking with external parties. Originally from Groningen, came to Delft for his studies in Mechanical Engineering. After living in beautiful The Hague for 10 years, he recently moved to Bleiswijk with his girlfriend. You can find him sailing or mountain biking on the weekends.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Renee van Drunen (35)
Sales Professional

Renee has been working at EuropeTrack since July 2022. She lives with her boyfriend in Bergschenhoek. Currently, she is heavily involved in a renovation, but she will be able to enjoy her dream house after the summer. In her free time, she enjoys being creative and using her brushes to make beautiful things. At work, she is responsible for incoming leads and customer contact. If you want to send her an email, you can do so at renee@europetrack.eu.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Jeroen Volwouter (46)
Mechanic

Jeroen is part of the old guard and knows all about installations. Nothing is too crazy for him and he sees a challenge in every vehicle. He lives with his wife and daughter in Leimuiden and they love to go camping in the summer. They also call him the Grillmaster! If you want to know which color wire you need, you can email him at jeroen@europetrack.eu.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Rayen Wirokromo
Mechanic

Rayen is our second man on the road. He easily installs all the systems. He lives in Zoetermeer with his girlfriend and daughter. When he has free time, he is always behind his screen gaming. You can also contact Rayen if you have any questions about vehicles and installing the boxes, you can email him at rayen@europetrack.eu.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Jesper Heesen (33)
Senior Manager Operations

Jesper has been working at EuropeTrack for almost two years now. For everything related to support, Jesper is the right person to go to - he'll take care of it! He lives with his girlfriend and newborn daughter in Gouda. If you have any questions or want to congratulate him on becoming a new dad, you can email him at jesper@europetrack.eu.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Sven Groenendijk (23)
Support

Our new addition to support. Sven has only been working for two weeks and was immediately thrown into the deep end as Jesper quickly went on leave. Sven is picking it up well and is already busy with questions and solutions for our customers. He lives with his parents and younger sister in Moordrecht and can often be found at the gym. If you want to wish him good luck with his new job, send him an email at sven@europetrack.eu.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Dilayra Osturk (23)
Finance

My name is Dilayra. I am 23 years old, and on June 1st, I will turn 24. Since January 9th, 2023, I have been employed at the most fun company, EuropeTrack! Within the company, I mainly focus on administration, such as cancellations that we receive, debtors/creditors, invoicing, and so on. Fortunately, it is never boring! If I have a free half-day, I really enjoy watching Netflix and, of course, snacking.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Jasper Algra
Senior Manager Operations

Co-founder of EuropeTrack. Final responsibility for IT planning, operations and infrastructure, Product Research & development and overall business.

Active in ICT and product development for 22 years. Master of Science in Mechanical Engineering and Industrial Design Engineering at TU Delft.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
EuropeTrack | Sharina de Bruin (45)
Planner

I'm 45 years old and live with my partner Thijs and our 2 daughters Summer, 12 years old, and Amy, 8 years old, in Leidschendam. In my free time, I enjoy spending time with family and friends, traveling, and going out on the water on nice days.

As a planner, I schedule orders daily and assist customers promptly with a personal touch. I optimize routes to save our technicians time and avoid sending them all over the country in one day. Thanks to our direct communication and techs' involvement, we can often handle urgent jobs on the same day, which customers appreciate.

If you need to reach me or just want to chat, you can email me at sharina@europetrack.eu.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: <hr style="height: 2px; background-color: #e20030; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 23px; width:100%;border: none;">

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
MiDE | Marc Kuhn
Content Specialist

Marc, a new Content Specialist with technical expertise and a Bachelor's degree in Sociology, joined the team on February 15, 2023, having previously gained 1 year of PR consulting and 6 months of online marketing management experience.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
MiNL | Charlotte Broekman
CMO

Our new CMO, Charlotte, joined the team on April 12, 2023, bringing ten years of automotive experience and 11 years of content and communication management at VodafoneZiggo.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: <hr style="height: 2px; background-color: #e20030; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 23px; width:100%;border: none;">

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: Meet MiUK

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Amanda Smith

Amanda specialises in sales and customer service.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Callum Ashton

Callum is an expert in telesales.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Anastasia Gwynne

Anastasia is a creative problem solver.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Michelle Tebay

Michelle brings a wealth of experience in the leisure industry.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Luke Foster

Luke brings competitor insight having previously worked for a different telematics company.

componentInstanceProperties.name: htmlValue

properties.name: preheader
properties.value: We're thrilled to share the latest updates with our colleagues at Moving Intelligence!
